name: 2089 - Space Divided
short_description: 2089 - Space Divided is a classic science fiction real-time strategy game in which you collect resources, build up your base, train troops and destroy your opponents with tactical skill.
detailed_description:
Join the community

Join our Discord server to exchange ideas with the community and the developers and actively participate in the development.


Fight against your enemies


Fight for supremacy on the battlefield in exciting PvE and PvP games.
Or prove your stamina against endless waves of opponents.


Build your base


Expand your base and create powerful troop units.
Research new technologies to give you an advantage in battle.


About the Game

In the sci-fi RTS game "2089 - Space Divided", you become the commander of one of two factions. Travel to alien worlds for your faction and fight for supremacy. Be smarter than your opponents and secure your dominance on the battlefield.

  • Experience exciting battles in futuristic worlds with different units, buildings and environments.

  • Choose from two unique factions with different strengths, weaknesses and strategies.

  • Collect valuable resources to expand your base and research new technologies.

  • Train your troops and improve them with upgrades to give them an advantage in battle.

  • Use the terrain conditions to surprise, flank or ambush your enemies.

  • Play alone or with friends in single player or multiplayer mode.

Our team:

CoastGames is a small development studio founded by Alex, Felix and Chris, based in Kiel (Germany).

2089 - Space Divided is our first game.

We have set ourselves the goal of developing exciting games with our community beyond Space Divided in the future.

supported_languages:
English*, German, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
